suggestion: Install Ollama and pull required models for local AI inference
justification: Ollama provides failsafe AI inference when API keys are exhausted or unavailable

suggestion: Implement fallback provider selection when primary LLM fails
justification: System should gracefully degrade when primary LLM provider is unavailable

suggestion: Implement comprehensive input validation for API requests
justification: Prevent malicious or erroneous inputs from causing system failures and security vulnerabilities

suggestion: Add output validation checks to ensure expected formats and data types
justification: Ensure consistent, valid outputs from AI models and prevent unexpected behavior

suggestion: Enhance model input validation with specific checks for LLM providers
justification: Prevent incompatible or invalid inputs from causing failures in AI inference processes
